As our Data Scientist you will have the opportunity to make a meaningful impact, leveraging and further developing your skills to guide groundbreaking AI initiatives. If you're looking for a place to grow your career and where your contributions will shape the future, AIG is where you belong.

This role is critical to innovation team in AICOE. Through this initiative, we are building a strategic capability to Implement Advanced AI Techniques, including RAG, Knowledge Graph, Agentic design, POC and Model Context Protocol MCP with evaluators to ensure reliability and performance. This role is critical to contribute to the invention in AIG GenAI's projects and AIG's Intelligent property, which keeps AIG leading the insurance industry in Gen AI area.

GenAI research and application: Stay up to date with the latest advancements in GenAI and apply this knowledge to develop innovative solutions that drive member and business value. This includes designing and implementing novel architectures, algorithms, and techniques for LLMs, multi-modal models, and other GenAI applications. Be accountable for high-quality data science solutions with respect to accuracy, coverage, scalability, stability, and business adoption
...
Agentic system development and optimization: Design and build enterprise level Agentic solution, including data processing and curation, to mitigate biases and ensure high-quality datasets for optimized model performance. Influence efficient Agentic architecture design for optimal performance, efficiency, and scalability
...
Research strategy and direction: Define and drive the long-term research vision and strategy for GenAI in the organization, aligning with business objectives and goals. This includes identifying key research areas, setting ambitious goals, and developing achievable milestones. Take ownership of algorithms and drive enhancements/optimizations based on business requirements with proper documentation and code-reusability
...
GenAI thought leader: Advance expertise in GenAI through continuous learning, attending conferences, and engaging with the broader research community. Contribute to the team's knowledge base and advance the field through publications, presentations, and sharing of insights and expertise
...
Design and deploy Agentic AI solutions to automate complex business workflows, enhance decision-making, and improve customer and employee experiences.
...
Translate research in agentic AI, reinforcement learning, and reasoning into practical solutions that support underwriting, Operation, claims automation, customer servicing, and risk assessment
...
Experience implementing Agentic AI frameworks, such as CrewAI, Claude Agent sdk and LangChain, to build autonomous systems in production settings
...
Strong ML, Deep Learning and Gen AI hand-on and scientific research skills
...

...

# AI Sandbox Product Owner, GenAI
...
AI Sandbox Product Owner
...
At AIG, we are making long-term investments in a brand-new, innovative Generative AI team, designed to explore new possibilities for how artificial intelligence can be applied in insurance and beyond, and we need your help. With the support and investment needed to explore new frontiers in generative AI, you'll be working alongside talented colleagues, innovating and leading projects that will transform how we manage risk and serve our customers.
...
The AI Sandbox Product Owner plays a pivotal role in shaping the vision, strategy, and execution of AI Sandbox solutions within the organization. This position bridges the gap between business stakeholders, engineering teams, and end users to deliver innovative and compliant AI products. The Product Owner will lead the development and enhancement of the AI Sandbox platform, ensuring alignment with organizational objectives, regulatory requirements, and user needs.
...
Define and communicate the product vision, roadmap, and priorities for the AI Sandbox platform.
...
Collaborate with cross-functional teams including engineering, data science, compliance, and UX to deliver high-quality product releases.
...
Manage the product backlog, prioritize enhancements, and ensure timely delivery of features.
...
Monitor and evaluate product performance, user feedback, and adoption metrics to inform continuous improvement.
...
Ensure the AI Sandbox complies with industry standards, security protocols, and privacy regulations.
...
Drive innovation by identifying emerging trends and opportunities in AI and sandbox environments.
...
Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Business, or a related field; Master's degree preferred.
...
5+ years of experience in product ownership or management, preferably in AI, data science, or software development environments.
...
Strong understanding of AI technologies, sandbox architectures, and regulatory compliance in data-driven products.
...
Proven track record in leading cross-functional teams and delivering complex technical products.
...
Passion for innovation and continuous learning in the AI domain.
...
American International Group, Inc. (AIG) is a global leader in commercial and personal insurance solutions; we are one of the world's most far-reaching property casualty networks. It is an exciting time to join us — across our operations, we are thinking in new and innovative ways to deliver ever-better solutions to our customers. At AIG, you can go further to support individuals, businesses, and communities, helping them to manage risk, respond to times of uncertainty and discover new potential. We invest in our largest asset, our people, through continuous learning and development, in a culture that celebrates everyone for who they are and what they want to become.

...
At AIG, we are making long-term investments in a brand-new, innovative Generative AI team, designed to explore new possibilities for how artificial intelligence can be applied in insurance and beyond, and we need your help.
...
With the support and investment needed to explore new frontiers in generative AI, you'll be working alongside talented colleagues, innovating and leading projects that will transform how we manage risk and serve our customers.
...
At AIG, we're reshaping how the world manages risk, and we're inviting you to be a key part of that transformation. As an AI Observability Engineer, you will have the opportunity to make a meaningful impact, leveraging and further developing your skills to guide groundbreaking AI initiatives. If you're looking for a place to grow your career and where your contributions will shape the future, AIG is where you belong.
...
The AI Observability Engineer plays a critical role in interaction with our AI product teams to ensure the AI solutions are aligned with the enterprise Responsible AI principles and standards. Additionally, the AI Observability Analyst supports the design and execution of the overall AI Governance program as well as the communication and awareness initiatives associated with Responsible AI principles and methods through the following activities:
...
- Model Performance Monitoring: Tracking ML,LLM, Agentic AI key performance indicators (KPIs) like context relevance, accuracy, precision, recall, and F1 scores to ensure model effectiveness
...
- Data Quality and Bias Detection: Monitoring data inputs for anomalies, bias, and drift, which can impact the fairness and accuracy of AI systems
...
- Utilize observability tools to produce structured, trustworthy insights from detailed data sets on AI system activities.
...
- Manage on-going operations of our AI model management platform and pipelines including evolving our KPIs and model observability capabilities
...
- Review AI solutions across the business to ensure alignment with AIG's Organizational Policies, AI Governance Framework and Responsible AI principles
...
- Provide support to AI product teams, conduct independent reviews, responding to ad-hoc queries, and participating in workshops
...
- Monitor and remain up to date
...
emerging global AI regulatory frameworks, standards and policies by participating in workshops, reading publications, networking with the goal of helping to translate into RAI framework updates

- Machine Learning, Large Language Models knowledge of various models, algorithms, and evaluation metrics is crucial for effective monitoring.
- Data pipelines and analysis skills with the ability to handle, clean, and transform data for monitoring and analysis.
...
- Excited about the problem of scaling human oversight of AI systems and familiar with LLMs development
...
- You bring experience and passion in Responsible AI or AI ethics, with an understanding of AI technologies and frameworks such as Generative AI
...
- You have a strong ability to collaborate with cross-functional teams and drive the implementation of Responsible AI practices, ideally within financial services or other regulated industries
...
- You have a working knowledge of effective policies and processes around
...
- You are passionate about staying ahead of emerging global AI regulations and translating these frameworks into practical, actionable updates
...
- Prior experience building production LLM, RAG or model inference monitoring pipelines
- Instrumenting applications using OpenTelemetry distributed tracing or structured logs.
- Hands on experience with AI Observability tools such as Fiddler, Arize, LangSmith or similar tools.
- Ability to build dashboards and alerts tied to AI model behavior beyond system uptime.

AI ML Engineer at [AIG](https://www.linkedin.com/company/aig)
...
AI/ML Engineer with 5+ years of experience designing, developing, and deploying scalable machine learning and deep learning solutions across healthcare, AI infrastructure, and enterprise systems. I specialize in building end-to-end AI pipelines, advanced NLP applications, and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems using modern ML frameworks and GPU-accelerated computing. My experience includes developing predictive analytics models, transformer-based NLP systems, and LLM-powered knowledge retrieval platforms that process large-scale structured and unstructured datasets. I have worked extensively with Python, PyTorch, TensorFlow, and advanced machine learning algorithms to design high-performance models for real-world applications. I have contributed to AI initiatives in pharmaceutical research and GPU-accelerated deep learning environments, where I built scalable ML pipelines, optimized model performance, and implemented production-ready inference systems. My work spans predictive modeling, clinical text mining, semantic search systems, and distributed deep learning workloads. Core Areas of Expertise: • Machine Learning & Predictive Modeling • Deep Learning (PyTorch, TensorFlow) • Generative AI & Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) • Natural Language Processing (BERT, BioBERT, Transformer Models) • GPU-Accelerated AI (CUDA, TensorRT, RAPIDS) • Vector Databases & Semantic Search (FAISS, Pinecone) • ML Pipelines, Feature Engineering & Model Optimization • Clinical & Biomedical Data Analytics I enjoy collaborating with cross-functional teams to translate complex data into intelligent AI solutions that drive better decision-making, improve system performance, and unlock insights from large datasets. highlights:
“Data Scientist | 3+ Years in Machine Learning, Predictive Analytics & Cloud Data Engineering (AWS, Python, SQL)”
...
Data Scientist at [AIG](https://www.linkedin.com/company/aig)
...
I am a Data Scientist with 3+ years of experience designing and deploying machine learning models, building scalable data pipelines, and delivering actionable insights that drive business growth. My expertise lies in leveraging Python, SQL, and cloud platforms (AWS, GCP) to transform complex datasets into predictive, impactful solutions. At AIG, I engineered automated APIs and ML-driven fraud detection systems, saving over $50K per quarter and improving campaign effectiveness by 15%. Previously at Adons Softech, I streamlined data workflows, designed optimized databases, and built interactive dashboards in Tableau, enabling faster decision-making and boosting user engagement. I bring a strong foundation in statistical analysis, predictive modeling, NLP, and time-series forecasting, with hands-on experience in AWS (S3, Lambda, SageMaker), Snowflake, Apache Spark, Airflow, and Docker. Beyond technical execution, I focus on aligning data strategies with business goals to improve efficiency, reduce costs, and uncover growth opportunities. Core strengths: Machine Learning & Predictive Analytics Cloud Data Engineering (AWS, GCP) Data Visualization (Tableau, Power BI, Plotly) ETL/ELT Pipelines & Data Modeling CI/CD for ML Deployments I am currently pursuing my Master’s in Computer Science at Rivier University (expected May 2025), further strengthening my skills in algorithms, software engineering, and advanced data systems. Always eager to collaborate on solving real-world problems with data and AI.

results.title: AIG Expands Jim Young’s Role to Global Chief Data Officer and Head of Agentic AI Solutions - CDO Magazine
highlights:
IG Expands Jim Young’s Role to Global Chief Data Officer and Head of
...
ic AI Solutions
...
# AIG Expands Jim Young’s Role to Global Chief Data Officer and Head of Agentic AI Solutions
...
Jim Young, AIG Global Chief Data Officer and Head of Agentic AI Solutions
...
AIG has expanded Jim Young’s role, adding Head of Agentic AI Solutions to his existing position as Global Chief Data Officer, broadening his responsibilities to include enterprise AI strategy alongside his data and analytics leadership for the General Insurance business.
...
In this expanded capacity, he will lead AIG’s data and analytics function for its General Insurance business, with additional responsibility for AI strategy, implementation, and digital transformation across underwriting and claims.
...
Young leads the architecture, development, and maintenance of AIG’s data and analytics capabilities for General Insurance. His responsibilities also include AI strategy and governance, as well as improving customer, agent, and employee experience, operational efficiency, and product and service innovation.
...
He also established AIG’s AI governance framework and chairs the company’s Data Governance Council of C-level executives, setting enterprise-wide standards and priorities for data and analytics.
...
Prior to joining AIG, Young spent more than a decade at Travelers, where he held senior data and analytics leadership roles, including SVP, Information Management & Analytics for the Business Insurance and International Division. Earlier in his career, he held leadership roles at Allstate, United Devices, and EY. Jim Young holds a position on the CDO Magazine Global Board, showcasing his contributions to the field of data.

### 1. What is a GenAI Engineer at AIG?
...
As a **GenAI Engineer** at **AIG**, you are at the forefront of a major technological transformation. **AIG** is not merely adopting AI; it is fundamentally reimagining how global risk is managed, how claims are processed, and how the company delivers value to clients across 190 countries. Your work will involve building and operationalizing cloud-native, AI-driven solutions that directly influence the core of the insurance business.
...
This role requires a blend of high-level architectural thinking and hands-on technical execution. You will work within a dedicated, innovative team that leverages modern technologies—such as **Python, PySpark, AWS, and Palantir Foundry**—to solve complex, real-world problems. Whether you are developing RAG frameworks, optimizing data pipelines, or integrating LLMs into enterprise workflows, your contributions will be central to **AIG’s** strategic vision of a more efficient, data-driven future.
...

Because **AIG** is making long-term investments in its **GenAI** capabilities, they are looking for candidates who are not only technically strong but also demonstrate a genuine passion for the evolving landscape of artificial intelligence. Communication skills are as critical as coding proficiency; you must be able to articulate your thought process clearly to both technical and business-focused interviewers.

As a **GenAI Engineer**, your primary objective is to bridge the gap between experimental AI research and production-grade enterprise software. You will lead the design and operationalization of big data solutions that feed into **AIG’s** AI models. This involves significant collaboration with data scientists to refine model performance and with product managers to ensure the solutions meet specific business needs.
...
You will spend a significant portion of your time building and maintaining scalable APIs and data processing pipelines. You will also be responsible for monitoring system health, managing technical risk, and ensuring that all AI applications adhere to **AIG’s** strict ethical and compliance standards. The role is inherently cross-functional, requiring you to act as a technical translator between the development team and the business units that rely on your AI solutions.
...
A successful candidate for the **GenAI Engineer** role at **AIG** typically possesses a strong academic or professional background in computer science or a related engineering field.

results.title: Agentic AI Data Scientist | Hirevector
highlights: to achieve your goals – and to help others accomplish theirs, too. Join our team as we help shape the future. Step into the future with The Hartford as an Agentic AI Data Scientist, where Generative AI isn't just a buzzword—it's central to our strategy. Join a team that's pioneering AI-driven solutions in underwriting, claims processing, and customer service, transforming how we operate and make decisions. As part of our Global Specialty Data Science & Analytics team, you'll tackle advanced use cases and shape the development of Gen AI capabilities across the organization. Here, your work will have a tangible impact, driving innovation and operational excellence with cutting-edge AI tools. If you're looking for a role where your expertise is not only valued but essential to our success, The Hartford is the place for you. We are looking for a technically proficient GenAI data scientist with deep implementation experience in building and evaluating GenAI systems, and a proven ability to stay at the forefront tools and techniques in the evolving AI landscape. This role can have a Hybrid or Remote work schedule. Candidates who live near one of our locations will have the expectation of working in an office 3 days a week (Tuesday through Thursday). Responsibilities: Support The Hartford’s AI innovation strategy to identify and implement high-end use cases, ensuring alignment with business objectives and emerging industry trends. Support cutting-edge AI vision and roadmap for the enterprise to make The Hartford a leader in using AI for the insurance industry. Partner with stakeholders internal to the Data Science organization, Technology organization and business organization, aligning with business objectives and driving innovation to improve productivity and efficiency of underwriting and sales efforts. Design and build GenAI solutions for tasks such as summarization, question answering, search, data synthesis, etc. Apply AI techniques to low frequency, high severity exposures in Specialty Insurance. Rapidly prototype with cutting-edge tools, such as VertexAI/Google agent development kit, LangChain/LangGraph, RAG frameworks, HuggingFace, OpenAI APIs, etc. Research and recommend noval foundation model options, tools, and libraries to improve solutions in performance and reliability. Develop evaluation pipelines for generative outputs using a mix of automatic metrics, human feedback, and llm-as-a-judge methods. Collaborate with ML Ops to ensure best practice is followed for scalable training and deployment. Qualifications: Master’s or PhD in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Engineering or a related field. 3+ years of industry experience in machine learning or data science and with 1+ years focused on GenAI. Experience developing and deploying agentic AI workflows and systems. Proven experience in GenAI tools such as Vertex AI/Google agent development kit, LangChain/LangGraph, RAG frameworks, HuggingFace, OpenAI APIs, etc. Solid understanding of prompt engineering, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), agent workflow, and LLM evaluation. Proficiency in Python and ML frameworks such as PyTorch, TensorFlow, etc. Experience with vector databases such as Chroma, Pinecone, etc. and cloud platforms such as GCP, AWS, Azure, etc. Strong analytical, problem solving and debugging skills. Excellent communication and collaboration skills, with the ability to explain complex technical concepts to non-technical stakeholders across the enterprise. Candidate must be authorized to work in the US without company sponsorship. The company will not support the STEM OPT I-983 Training Plan endorsement for this position. Compensation The listed annualized base pay range is primarily based on analysis of similar positions in the external market. Actual base pay could vary and may be above or below the listed range based on factors including but not limited to performance, proficiency and demonstration of competencies
